tagline: Free online tools that actually work.
hero_sub: Compress images, convert PDFs, format code, calculate anything. Fast, free, and private.
tool_image_compress_desc: Compress JPG, PNG, WebP images in your browser. Adjustable quality. Zero upload.
tool_image_resize_desc: Resize images to exact dimensions or percentage. Lock aspect ratio.
tool_pdf_merge_desc: Merge multiple PDFs into one, or split a PDF into pages. Browser-side, private.
tool_word_counter_desc: Words, characters, reading time, lexical density, top words.
tool_case_converter_desc: UPPERCASE, lowercase, camelCase, snake_case and more.
tool_unit_converter_desc: Length, weight, temperature, speed and 200+ combinations.
tool_json_formatter_desc: Pretty-print, minify, validate JSON. Tree view. Syntax highlighted.
tool_base64_desc: Encode and decode Base64. URL-safe mode. File to Base64.
tool_color_converter_desc: HEX ↔ RGB ↔ HSL ↔ HSV ↔ CMYK. Visual picker. Palettes.
footer_tagline: Built with care — everything runs in your browser.
faq_free_a: Yes — completely free, forever. No hidden plans, no file size limits, no daily quotas.
faq_upload_q: Do my files get uploaded to a server?
faq_upload_a: No. Every tool runs entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
